subcodes.first_line: O sincere servant of Truth! Be thou glad and take thy rest; be grateful and enriched. Execute the ordinances of government [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صادق حق شاد باش و مستریح ممنون باش و مستفید اوامر حکومت را انفاذ
subcodes.subjects: @obedience to and respect for government authority
